notes: Aligned the af-build skills to the customer-app ai/specs convention: backend PRD at ai/specs/spec-be-prd.md, backend DDD at ai/specs/spec-be-ddd.md, backend DSL at ai/specs/dls-be-ddd.yaml, and plan output at ai/specs/spec-be-plan.md. Removed default sidecar review-notes outputs and updated the plan and DSL templates to reference ai/specs/project.dsl.yaml and ai/specs/spec-be-ddd.md.
